commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an Ace Data Cloud external provider catalog entry, a provider docs page, and docs navigation/redirect entries.

PR surface: Docs +126, Other +56. Total +182 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch defects: source inspection shows OpenClaw writes web-search setup credentials to the catalog credentialPath, while the published plugin reads the plugin-scoped path. The docs route mismatch is also source-reproducible because current navigation exposes tools/web, not tools/web-search.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs contributor proof and maintainer trust approval for the third-party official catalog listing; the mechanical fixes alone are not enough for automation to finish the PR.

target.title: docs(providers): register Ace Data Cloud third-party provider plugin
target.body:
## Summary

Adds [`@acedatacloud/openclaw-provider`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@acedatacloud/openclaw-provider) as an external provider entry so the package becomes discoverable through `openclaw plugins install` and the onboarding wizard, and ships a `/providers/acedatacloud` docs page describing setup.

[Ace Data Cloud](https://platform.acedata.cloud) is a unified, OpenAI-compatible AI gateway. The plugin exposes:

- **Chat** — 60+ curated models (Claude / GPT / o-series / Gemini / Grok / DeepSeek / Kimi / GLM) plus passthrough for any upstream Ace Data Cloud model id, all routed through `https://api.acedata.cloud/v1`.
- **Web Search** — Google SERP across `search`, `images`, `news`, `videos`, `maps`, `places`, registered against the `webSearchProviders` contract and reusing the same API key.

## What this PR changes

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `scripts/lib/official-external-provider-catalog.json` | Add `@acedatacloud/openclaw-provider` entry (`source: "external"`, `kind: "provider"`), with a chat `auth-choice` for the `text-inference` onboarding scope and a `webSearchProviders` registration. |
| `docs/providers/acedatacloud.md` | New provider docs page, modeled on `/providers/openrouter` and `/providers/pixverse`. |
| `docs/docs.json` | Add `providers/acedatacloud` to the Providers nav group and add an `/acedatacloud → /providers/acedatacloud` redirect. |

No upstream source changes — we live in our own npm package and our own repo, and we only need the catalog + docs entries here so the OpenClaw CLI knows about us.

## Plugin metadata

- **npm:** [`@acedatacloud/openclaw-provider@2026.5.32`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@acedatacloud/openclaw-provider)
- **Source:** [github.com/AceDataCloud/OpenClawProvider](https://github.com/AceDataCloud/OpenClawProvider)
- **License:** MIT
- **Min host version:** `>=2026.4.2`
- **Capabilities:** `text-inference: acedatacloud`, `web-search: acedatacloud`
- **Auth env vars:** `ACEDATA_API_KEY`, `ACEDATACLOUD_API_KEY`
- **CLI flags:** `--acedata-api-key <key>`, `--auth-choice acedatacloud-api-key`

## Verification

End-to-end install + load verified against the current `openclaw@2026.5.30-beta.1` release:

```
$ openclaw plugins install '@acedatacloud/openclaw-provider' --pin
Installed plugin: acedatacloud

$ openclaw plugins inspect acedatacloud
Ace Data Cloud
id: acedatacloud
Status: loaded
Format: openclaw
Source: ~/.openclaw/npm/projects/.../node_modules/@acedatacloud/openclaw-provider/dist/index.js
Origin: global
Version: 2026.5.32
Shape: hybrid-capability
Capability mode: hybrid

Capabilities:
  text-inference: acedatacloud
  web-search: acedatacloud
```

A live chat turn through the plugin reaches `api.acedata.cloud/v1/chat/completions` correctly:

```
$ openclaw agent --local --session-key smoke --model 'acedatacloud/claude-haiku-4-5' -m 'Hello'
[diagnostic] lane task: model=acedatacloud/claude-haiku-4-5 provider=acedatacloud → 200 OK
```

## Why a separate package

Ace Data Cloud is a third-party gateway, so we maintain the plugin source in our own repo and publish it under our own npm scope. Adding our entry to the official-external-provider-catalog is the same pattern other third-party plugins like `@wecom/wecom-openclaw-plugin` and `openclaw-plugin-yuanbao` already follow in the channel catalog.

Happy to adjust framing, fields, or doc shape if the maintainers prefer a different convention for external LLM providers. Thanks for OpenClaw!
target.author: acedatacloud-dev
